name: grok-build-codex
description: Stateful Grok Build bridge for Codex planning, delegation, monitoring, review, and repair workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan in Codex, implement in Grok, then review and validate.
interface.longDescription: A stateful bridge from Codex to the local Grok Build CLI with transcript import, foreground and background delegation, run status, stored output, cancellation, session resume, and Codex-owned review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $delegate-to-grok to plan this task, delegate implementation to Grok, and review the result.
Check whether the Grok Build bridge is ready and show recent tracked runs.
Import this Codex task into Grok, then prepare a bounded implementation handoff.
